name: jstack
description: Universal JStack development and read-only audit commands, workflow skills, and MCP evidence tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise development and audit workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: JStack adds four Codex workflows: single-lead development, right-sized specialist subagents, full 11-role team mode, and evidence-bound read-only repository audits. It includes JStack skills and MCP quality gates for planning, review, QA, audit finalization, release readiness, and quant/backtest checks.
defaultPrompt: Use /j-stack-dev to run the single-lead workflow.
Use /jstack-subagents for a specialist team or /jstack-full-team for all 11 roles.
Use /jstack-audit for a read-only evidence-bound repository audit.
